ddls:
CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product category (e.g., Apparel, Food) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the product category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the category was last updated */,
  "factor" INTEGER /* A factor representing category importance or weight */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (if any) */,
  "category_type" TEXT /* Type of category (e.g., top-level, sub-category) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., marketing, sales, inventory management) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "category_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category being tracked */,
  "sales_volume" REAL /* Total sales volume for the category */,
  "customer_engagement" REAL /* Measure of customer engagement for the category */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated by the category */,
  "profit_margin" REAL /* Profit margin of the category */,
  "market_trend" TEXT /* Information about market trends related to the category */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_category_performance_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "category_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category that was changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "change_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the changes made */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_category_logs_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_category_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "category_attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related product category */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute (e.g., Seasonality, Gender Targeted) */,
  "attribute_value" TEXT /* Value of the attribute (e.g., Winter, Male) */,
  "attribute_group" TEXT /* Group the attribute belongs to (e.g., product features, marketing attributes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_category_attributes_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, manager) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the category */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "category_promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category being promoted */,
  "promotion_details" TEXT /* Details of the promotion */,
  "promotion_type" TEXT /* Type of promotion (e.g., discount, bundle deal) */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_category_promotions_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "category_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who provided the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the customer (1 to 5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the customer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_category_reviews_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)
